rewrite.text:
PROVE plus_zero_right: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
    GOAL: n + 0 = n
      INDUCTION n
        PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
          SINCE n = 0:
            n + 0 = 0 + 0 [BY addition_def]
            = 0 [BY zero_add]
          THEREFORE n + 0 = 0
        PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S m
          ASSUME m : ℕ
          INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: m + 0 = m
          SINCE n = S m:
            n + 0 = S m + 0 [BY addition_def]
            = S (m + 0) [BY plus_s]
          APPLY ih:
            FACT h1: m + 0 = m [BY ih]
          SIMPLIFY:
            S (m + 0)
            = S m [BY h1]
          THEREFORE n + 0 = S m
      CONCLUDE: By induction on n, n + 0 = n [QED]
END
